# 03 Ensure Compliance with Package Submission Guidelines

In order to ensure the typst package adheres to the typst package submission guidelines do the following:

- Read [package submission guidelines](https://github.com/typst/packages/blob/main/docs/README.md)
- Use `hk run lint` to automatically check against guidelines automatically (expect warnings in `examples/` and missing `README.md`)
- Read <https://www.makeareadme.com/>
- Create a `template/main.typ`
- Create a `README.md` with the following sections:
  - Name
  - Badges
  - Description (without heading)
  - Showcase/Visuals
  - Installation
  - Usage
  - Contributing
  - Authors and acknowledgemnt (disclose usage of coding agents)
  - License
